title: Every Level of Hermes Agent Explained
summary: Jack Roberts breaks down a seven-level progression for building Hermes agents, from basic prompts to fully automated agentic operating systems. The video covers connecting multiple LLM providers (Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, DeepSeek) into unified workflows, building custom skills, orchestrating parallel sub-agents, and automating scheduled tasks.
writeup: Jack Roberts maps a seven-level progression for building Hermes agents, moving from basic prompts up to fully automated agentic operating systems. The video shows how to connect multiple LLM providers (Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, and DeepSeek) into unified workflows, build custom skills, orchestrate parallel sub-agents, and automate scheduled tasks. The framing matters because it organizes agent capability into discrete tiers rather than a single setup, with browser automation and skill composition as recurring building blocks.
